selectInstanceModal.title: Select Instance
selectInstanceModal.emptyHint: Go to Instance Management to create or import your first game environment

noAccount.title: Cannot Launch Instance
noAccount.headline: No Game Account Detected
noAccount.description:
Launching Minecraft requires at least one valid game account.
Please go to Settings to add a Microsoft account.

noInstance.title: Cannot Launch Game
noInstance.headline: No Instances Created
noInstance.description:
You need to create or import a game instance first.
Browse Resource Downloads for modpacks, or import from local files.

sidebar.transferConsoleHint: Click a trusted online device from the list on the left to transfer instances or saves across devices.
sidebar.trustRequestMessage: Device {{deviceName}} wants to establish LAN trust with you
sidebar.trustRequestHint: Once accepted, you can transfer game instances and saves between devices, and view each other's real-time game status. Make sure you recognize this device.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer Hub
multiplayer.description: Community Server Directory and PiHub Direct Connect.

zip.label: Standard ZIP
zip.desc: Maximum compatibility and full file bundling.

curseforge.label: CurseForge
curseforge.desc: Exports a CurseForge-style archive with manifest.json.

pipack.label: PiPack
pipack.desc: PiLauncher smart pack with mixed-source mod recovery.

manifest.title: MANIFEST MODE
manifest.primary: Prefer platform references over bundling mod files when the source can be resolved.
manifest.fallback: Mods without a recoverable platform reference stay inside the archive as fallbacks.
manifest.pipackLocked: PiPack always writes `pi_manifest.json` and only bundles mods that cannot be restored from their source platform.

hero.verifyingDescription: Comparing the current instance against the backup snapshot for Minecraft version, loader, mods, and configs.
hero.defaultDescription: A guard backup of the current world will be created before the selected snapshot is restored.

strategy.primary: Create a guard backup for the current world before restoring the selected snapshot.

toggle.title: Restore Config Files Too
toggle.description: This replaces the current `config` and `defaultconfigs`. Enable it when you want a full rollback of both the world and configs.

warnings.title: Risks Detected
warnings.modEnvironmentDiffers: Mod environment differs: current {{current}} mods, backup {{backup}} mods.
warnings.configSnapshotDiffers: Config snapshot differs from the current instance. Enable config restore for a full rollback.
warnings.unsafeSnapshot: This snapshot was marked non-safe and may have been created while the world was active.

deviceName.label: Device Name
deviceName.description: Identifier used for LAN discovery and file transfer.

language.label: Launcher Language
language.description: Change the display language. Fully applied after restart.

checkUpdate.label: Check for Updates
checkUpdate.description: Check for new versions and install updates seamlessly within Tauri.

checkUpdateOnStart.label: Check Update on Start
checkUpdateOnStart.description: Automatically check for a new version every time you open the launcher.

preventTouchAction.label: Prevent Touch Action
preventTouchAction.description: Disable default web touch behaviors globally.

toggleFullscreen.label: Toggle Fullscreen
toggleFullscreen.description: Manually enter or exit fullscreen mode.

exitApp.label: Exit App
exitApp.description: Close PiLauncher totally. A prompt will be shown.

linuxDisableDmabuf.label: Linux Compatibility Mode (DMABUF)
linuxDisableDmabuf.description: Disables WebKit DMABUF renderer to fix flickering/black screen on some Linux distros (e.g. Kali). **Requires manual restart**.

resetSettings.label: Reset Settings
resetSettings.description: Restore launcher settings to default. Data won't be deleted.

exitConfirm.title: Confirm Exit
exitConfirm.headline: Exit PiLauncher
exitConfirm.description: Clicking confirm will exit the launcher immediately. Background tasks will stop.

resetConfirm.title: Reset Settings
resetConfirm.headline: Confirm Reset
resetConfirm.description: Settings will be reset. Data and instances will be kept.

java.autoDownloadDesc: Select version and provider, then download to runtime/Java locally.
java.autoDetectDesc: If enabled, scans on startup and automatically picks the best versions.
java.globalPathDesc: Default Java path used when mapped version isn't available.
java.memoryDesc: New instances inherit this global config by default unless customized.
java.maxMemoryDesc: Dynamically adjust the maximum RAM for the game.
java.jvmArgsDesc: Advanced level. Applies to instances that inherit settings.

selector.notFound: No available Java detected. Please browse manually.

testDialog.title: Java Test
testDialog.missingPathDesc: Please choose an executable Java path before testing.
testDialog.failedDesc: The current path cannot be used as a Java runtime.

appearance.selectLocalInfo: Click to select a local image
appearance.bgBlurDesc: Adjust the blur level for the main background image.
appearance.panoramaEnabledDesc: Use effective panorama from base_path/config/background if available.
appearance.panoramaSpeedDesc: Rotation speed for panorama background. Set 0 to pause.
appearance.maskColorDesc: Overlay color on background to ensure text readability.
appearance.maskOpacityDesc: Overlay opacity. Higher value makes background darker.
appearance.fontFamilyDesc: Main font for launcher. Fallbacks to Minecraft font if not supported.
appearance.maskGradientDesc: Add a black gradient at bottom to improve text/nav readability.

game.windowTitleDesc: Text displayed on the Minecraft game window titlebar.
game.fullscreenDesc: Enter exclusive fullscreen on game start.
game.showLogDesc: Expand console with logs during startup until loading is finished.
game.visibilityDesc: Action after Minecraft instance is successfully launched.

download.autoLatencyDesc: Test latency before downloading and pick the lowest one.
download.concurrencyDesc: Higher concurrency increases speed but consumes more CPU/RAM.
download.chunkedEnableDesc: Use multi-threaded downloads for large files that support Range.
download.chunkedThresholdDesc: Apply chunked downloading for files larger than this (MB).
download.timeoutDesc: Time before automatically interrupting and retrying.
download.retryDesc: Retry attempts when downloading a single file fails.
download.verifyHashDesc: Ensure file was not corrupted after downloaded.
download.proxyModeDesc: Affects downloads and APIs only, not game multi-player.
download.diagDesc: Check core domains accessibility, including DNS, TCP, TLS and HTTP.
download.scanQr: Scan QR Code\nTo get Base64 report
download.clickToTest: Click the button to test network status

account.noMcTip: Don't own Minecraft? Get it securely from official stores
account.delConfirmDesc: Are you sure? This only removes identity from launcher, \nwill NOT delete local save data.

data.currentLoc: Current: {{path}}\nMigrate all settings, logs, games to a new folder.
data.renameDirDesc: Rename the current data folder to distinguish it from others.
data.cleanLogsDesc: Empty all logs from logs/ directory to free space. Currently at: {{path}}
data.removeConfirmHeadline: Are you sure to remove this linked dir?
data.removeConfirmDesc1: This action unlinks the dir and cleans up related cache in PiLauncher.
data.removeConfirmDesc2: Original files will not be touched.
data.cleanLogsConfirmTitle: This will delete all log files under logs/ directory.
data.renameModalDesc: Launcher will restart after a successful rename.
data.thirdPartyListDesc1: Scanned during startup. Removal doesn't delete local data.
data.thirdPartyListDesc2: These external folders are managed by PiLauncher too.

about.productDesc: Cross-platform Minecraft Launcher optimized for Gamepad and Handhelds.
about.thanksDesc: Because of your support, PiLauncher can continue to improve. You can sponsor us via AfDian above.
